title: Delhi Crime Branch Busted International Arms Smuggling Module, 21 Military-Grade Weapons Seized; 10 Arrested
description: In a major crackdown, the Delhi Crime Branch busted an international arms smuggling module linked to Pakistan, Nepal, and Bangladesh. A total of 10 operatives were arrested, with 21 high-end foreign weapons, including a sub-machine gun and 200 live cartridges, seized from the network supplying gangsters across Delhi-NCR.
